title: [CI:DOCS] Add license, release and go report badges
body:
*SAFE TO MERGE PR*

Added license, release and go report badges to readme:
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache_2.0-blue.svg) ![GitHub release (latest SemVer)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/containers/podman) [![Go Report Card](https://goreportcard.com/badge/github.com/containers/libpod)](https://goreportcard.com/report/github.com/containers/libpod)

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?



```release-note
None
```

Just for the record:

> @cevich do you recall?

I think that was with the Cirrus-CI badge, removed since nobody looked at it except me.
